summary: Both required documentation fixes applied. Bug is real, fix is structurally sound, documentation is now accurate. Proposal advances.

basis.bug_validity: confirmed. CEViewChange UNCHANGED msgs_ce_to_ob (line 322), OBReceiveMFR no session guard (line 391). Stale cross-session MFRs are consumable, producing phantom CEFinalizations.
basis.fix_soundness: confirmed. Session guard msg.session = ob_cached_ce_session[m] closes the gap. DownstreamOBReceiveCEViewChange correctly caches vc.session. UNCHANGED coverage complete.
basis.j1_resolved: properties_affected = []. properties_note accurately explains semantic gap and names a candidate new property.
basis.j2_resolved: init_coupling_note documents the ob_cached_ce_session=1 / ce_primary=1 invariant and the deadlock consequence of divergence.
